attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_LOG_ID, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.XXCCP_HEADER_ID, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.XXCCP_LINE_ID, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.QUOTE_HEADER_ID, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.QUOTE_LINE_ID, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.WEB_ORDER_NUMBER,
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ORDER_HEADER_ID, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ORDER_LINE_ID, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_MESSAGE, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_DESCRIPTION, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_DATE, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_TYPE, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_STATUS, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.FOR_CSE_INTEGRATION, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_STAGE, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_SUB_STAGE, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.OPERATION_CODE, 
'CG' GLOBAL_NAME, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.CREATED_BY, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.CREATION_DATE, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN_ID, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.CHANGE_HISTORY_ID, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ENTITY, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ELEMENT_NAME, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE1, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE2, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE3, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE4, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE5, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE6, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE7, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE8, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE9, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE10, 
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME 
FROM
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG
WHERE
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' AND CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME < '$$EndLastExtractDate' 
AND
CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_LOG_ID ORDER BY CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
